code:
import io
import string

value ParseResult
  value: Int
  next: Int
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  mut j = i
  mut done = false
  while not done and j < string.len(s)
    match string.byte_at(s, j)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        j = j + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  j
end

fn parse_int_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> ParseResult
  mut j = i
  mut sign = 1
  match string.byte_at(s, j)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 45
      sign = -1
      j = j + 1
    else if b == 43
      j = j + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  mut value = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done and j < string.len(s)
    match string.byte_at(s, j)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
        j = j + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  ParseResult(value: value * sign, next: j)
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let r1 = parse_int_at(input, skip_ws(input, 0))
let r2 = parse_int_at(input, skip_ws(input, r1.next))
let r3 = parse_int_at(input, skip_ws(input, r2.next))
let a = r1.value
let b = r2.value
let s = r3.value

mut out = ""
mut cur = a
mut first = true
while cur < b
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + s
end
println(out)
